description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex, multi-sectioned roof and a mix of brick and light-colored siding on the exterior. The property features a spacious driveway, a detached garage, and a landscaped front yard with several trees and shrubs. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a round above-ground pool, a swing set, and a small wooden playhouse, all set within a well-maintained lawn. The house has numerous windows, including bay windows and symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light. The main entryway is prominent, with steps leading up to a covered porch supported by columns. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, creating a comfortable and inviting residential environment.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a multi-sectioned roof, brick and siding exterior, landscaped yard, and backyard amenities including pools and a playhouse.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway extension, and partial view of the backyard with pools and play structures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard amenities: rectangular pool, round pool, swing set, and playhouse, as well as the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, additional landscaping, and the full extent of the backyard lawn.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of traditional and modern suburban)
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent front door with steps, covered porch, and supporting columns
